[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011111 7
1 10110001 4
2 01101111 6
3 11000110 4
4 11111111 a
5 10111111 7
6 01111111 7
7 11111100 6
